memoryArtifacts.headline: Folpert (van Arkel) van der Lede

zh.holy roman empire: 海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇
zh.Strasbourg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace-Champagne-A: 法國德 艾斯特巴-爾斯特拉斯布格
zh.lifeSummary: 當Folpert van der Lede於大約1103年出生在荷蘭-拉藍德利爾達姆時，他的父親Jan III van Arkel38歲，母親Adelheid Jansdr van Heusden44歲。他與Petronella van der Are結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他埋葬在法國德 艾斯特巴-爾斯特拉斯布格。

zh-hans.holy roman empire: 海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇
zh-hans.Strasbourg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace-Champagne-A: 法国德 艾斯特巴-爾斯特拉斯布格
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Folpert van der Lede于大约1103年出生在荷兰-拉藍德利爾達姆时，他的父亲Jan III van Arkel38岁，母亲Adelheid Jansdr van Heusden44岁。他与Petronella van der Are结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他埋葬在法国德 艾斯特巴-爾斯特拉斯布格。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: der
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Zoltan, Istvan, Janos, Lajos.
Hungarian (Dér): from the old personal name Dér of Turkic origin, or a nickname for a gray-haired man, from the vocabulary word dér ‘hoarfrost’.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 謝, see   Xie   1.

variants.name: Xie
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Hong, Li, Ming, Ying, Min, Qing, Yuan, Bin, Hui, Ping, Wei, Xiaoli, Ding, Chang, Lan, Quan, Cong, Dang, Hai, Tian, Yiping.

Mandarin form of the surname 謝, meaning ‘thank’ in Chinese: (i) from Xie (謝), the name of an ancient state (possibly located in Nanyang in Henan province), annexed around the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ).Later this place was probably granted to Shen Bo (the Earl of Shen), uncle of King Xuan of Zhou (reigned 827–782  BC ). After it was annexed during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), the name of the state was adopted as a surname. (ii) adopted in place of the surname Zhi-Le (直勒) by Xie Xiaozheng (謝孝政), an official during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ).

nameMeanings.name: Lede
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Possibly an Americanized form of German   Leid  .

variants.name: Leid
meanings: German: nickname from Middle High German leit ‘bad, evil, disgusting’.

nameMeanings.name: Folpert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Yehuda, Mendy.  Russian Vladimir, Aleksandr, Grigoriy, Leonid.
German and Jewish (from Lithuania): variant of   Wolpert  .

variants.name: Wolpert
meanings: German: from the personal name Waldobert, composed of the elements waltan ‘rule’ + bërht ‘bright’, ‘shining’.
Jewish (from Lithuania): assimilation to the German male personal name Wolpert, perceived as a variant of the Jewish male name Wolf .

en.lifeSummary: When Folpert van der Lede was born about 1103, in Leerdam, South Holland, Netherlands, his father, Jan III van Arkel, was 38 and his mother, Adelheid Jansdr van Heusden, was 44. He married Petronella van der Are. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He was buried in Strasbourg, Bas-Rhin, Grand Est, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Folpert van der Lede est né environ 1103, à Leerdam, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas, son père, Jan III van Arkel, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Adelheid Jansdr van Heusden, avait 44 ans. Il a épousé Petronella van der Are. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Ilenterré à Strasbourg, Bas-Rhin, Grand Est, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Folpert van der Lede um 1103 in Leerdam, Südholland, Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jan III van Arkel 38 und seine Mutter Adelheid Jansdr van Heusden 44. Er hat Petronella van der Are geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er wurde in Strasbourg, Bas-Rhin, Großer Osten, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Folpert van der Lede è nato il circa 1103 nel Leerdam, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi, il suo padre, Jan III van Arkel, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Adelheid Jansdr van Heusden, aveva 44 anni. Lui sposato Petronella van der Are. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Fu sepolto a Strasbourg, Bas-Rhin, Grand Est, Francia.

ja.Langerak, South Holland, Netherlands: オランダズイド-hオランドランジャーアク

ja.Strasbourg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace-Champagne-A: フランスグランド エストバス-ルヒンストラスボウルグ
ja.lifeSummary: Folpert van der Ledeが約1103年にオランダズイド-hオランドリールダムで生まれた時，父Jan III van Arkelは38歳，母Adelheid Jansdr van Heusdenは44歳であった。Petronella van der Areと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼はフランスグランド エストバス-ルヒンストラスボウルグにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Folpert van der Lede(이)가 대략 1103년 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 리르다에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jan III van Arkel(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelheid Jansdr van Heusden(은)는 44세였다. 그는 Petronella van der Are(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 바스-히 스트라스보우르그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Folpert van der Lede nasceu aproximadamente 1103, em Leerdam, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos, seu pai, Jan III van Arkel, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Adelheid Jansdr van Heusden, tinha 44 anos. Ele casou-se com Petronella van der Are. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele foi sepultado em Strasbourg, Bas-Rhin, Grand Est, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Folpert van der Lede родился около 1103 г. в местности лирдам, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Jan III van Arkel было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelheid Jansdr van Heusden, 44. Он женился на женщине по имени Petronella van der Are. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он был похоронен в местности страсбург, бас-рин, гранд эст, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Folpert van der Lede nació aproximadamente 1103, en Leerdam, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos, su papá, Jan III van Arkel, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Adelheid Jansdr van Heusden, tenía 44 años. Se casó con Petronella van der Are. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Fue sepultado en Strasbourg, Bas-Rhin, Grand Est, Francia.
